channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large potholes, 19th March
item.description:
At the junction of Beckenham Jn and on Barnmead Road before the unadopted road there are lots of dangerous potholes. Please can the council fix these as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnmead Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover outside Brookers on going to Erith lane. Manhole cover not fitted properly and makes loud noise when cars, hgv's and buses., 19th March
item.description:
Manhole cover outside Brookers on going to Erith lane. Manhole cover not fitted properly and makes loud noise when cars, hgv's and buses.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge ‘puddle’ approx 12ft x 2ft for a year, 19th March
item.description:
There is an expanse of water along the gutter for the past year, whatever the weather it’s there. It is 12 - 18 feet long and at least 2ft wide. It it outside 196, 198 and 194 St James’S Road SE1 5LN. The drain alongside it appears to be working, but there is a dip in the tarmac which makes this hug ‘puddle’ permanent. Please can you repair as it’s causing all sorts of issues here. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged speed bump, 19th March
item.description:
The speed bump is on the access back road to the garages and is a dangerous trip hazard for residents walking to or from their garage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Oakley Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged metal fencing, 19th March
item.description:
Hi, part of the metal fencing has been damaged, I suspect someone has driven in to it. Please could someone come to fix it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Neate Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soda and Rugs Flytipped, 19th March
item.description:
A grey sofa, red rug and brown mat have been dumped on the pavement on Anerley Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 19th March
item.description:
Medium fly tip of waste inc glass

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lowestoft Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris on pavement, 19th March
item.description:
Road cleaners do not clean pavements

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Mead, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped waste, 19th March
item.description:
Fly tipped waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lowestoft Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road breaking up again, 19th March
item.description:
This junction has been inadequately repaired over and over again. It needs completely RESURFACING. Yet again it is breaking up and offering potential vehicle damage. Riney simply shovelled tarmac into a couple of potholes last time - a complete waste of time/money. The area in Leesons Hill is now completely breaking up and multiple potholes appearing - again! Please repair this small but extremely busy junction PROPERLY as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on stee, 19th March
item.description:
Hi, I wanted to flag that there's litter and rubbish scattered all across the street—it's everywhere. It’s frustrating because it seems the street cleaner isn’t doing their job properly or regularly. Could this please be cleaned up as soon as possible?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Third time reporting this - flytipping, 19th March
item.description:
Three times now this has been reported to hackney council and three times you've claimed it's 'fixed'. please stop lying to residents. we pay council tax. it's a simple ask that you keep our neighbourhoods tidy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 54, 19th March
item.description:
Rubbishbleft on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Dog poo on 1 Glebe Road, 19th March
item.description:
A daily occurrence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glebe Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Dog poo on Curtain road by junction with Scrutton Street, 19th March
item.description:
Dog poo on the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Scrutton Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Sweeping needed, 19th March
item.description:
Pavement not swept and cleaned , rubbish and leaves

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Common, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes not respecting traffic light, 19th March
item.description:
Two related concerns, because there’s nowhere to list the first concern in the categories. Cyclists go too fast and are inconsiderate of pedestrians. Pedestrians are meant to have priority on the street and very often don’t, or have to dodge or wait for very long trains of very fast moving cyclists (usually e-powered). At this traffic light, cyclists regularly and frequently ignore the lights and move against traffic and pedestrians. It’s unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Goldsmiths' Row, Haggerston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Orient street SE11 4SR, near the green, 19th March
item.description:
Food waste on the street, next to the green, dumped by foxes during the night...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orient Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere Rd / Glengall Rd pedestrian area, 19th March
item.description:
The pedestrian area between Hazelmere and Glengall has a lot of litter to be picked up, please
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering

item.title: Sofa blocking pavement for last two weeks, 19th March
item.description:
Furniture dumped on pavement and on garden.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
